title: Asgard
summary: Asgard is an institutional-grade decentralized exchange on Solana designed around pro-trader speed and flow. Arcium currently includes it in encrypted DeFi ecosystem coverage rather than a publicly documented Arcium integration.
description:
Asgard describes itself as an institutional-grade decentralized exchange on Solana built to drop world-class traders into flow state. That framing puts it in the class of products where confidential execution and protected market structure are especially relevant.

Arcium includes Asgard in its encrypted DeFi ecosystem coverage. That supports Atlas inclusion, but I did not find a current Asgard page that documents a specific Arcium-powered execution component.

bodySections.title: Protocol_Surface
bodySections.body: The official site presents Asgard as a higher-performance trading venue for serious flow rather than a generic retail DEX. That orientation makes it relevant when Atlas is mapping where encrypted execution may actually matter in production trading behavior.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists Asgard among DeFi ecosystem partners. That is enough for ecosystem coverage, but the currently public Asgard materials do not spell out a confirmed Arcium integration path.

statusNote: Arcium includes Asgard in its encrypted DeFi ecosystem, but I did not find a current Asgard page naming a specific Arcium-powered feature.

sources.label: Asgard Website
sources.note: Official site describing Asgard as an institutional-grade Solana DEX.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
sources.note: Arcium lists Asgard among DeFi ecosystem partners.
